author: natipt
description: This lightweight plugin helps you read Chinese more easily with a CEDICT based hover-dictionary and vocabulary saving features.

manifest.author: natipt
manifest.description: Chinese-English hover dictionary and vocabulary management plugin.
manifest.name: Zhongwen Reader

name: Zhongwen Reader

releases.author: natipt
releases.description: Fixed HSK Vocab bug on the Obsidian release (download hsk-vocab.json on first plugin startup).
releases.name: Version 1.1.4

releases.author: natipt
releases.description:
This version implements changes requested by Obsidian devs:
- Ensures Zhongwen Reader downloads `cedict_ts.u8` from online on first activation, to make it compatible with Obsidian Plugin infrastructure.
- Ensures `vocab.json` is created if it doesn't already exist.
- Uses sentence case in command palette. 
- Shortens `manifest.json` description. 
- Removes Obsidian from README header.
releases.name: Version 1.1.2

releases.author: natipt
releases.description: This patch fixes Issue #1 on handling traditional vocabulary in the side pane view.
releases.name: Version 1.1.1

releases.author: natipt
releases.description:
🎉 New features:
- HSK vocabulary highlighting

✅ Improvements on code safety and following the Obsidian plugin development guidelines
- Normalize all file paths to improve cross-platform compatibility.
- Remove development console.log calls for a cleaner developer console.
- Safer sidebar refresh mechanism — avoids storing direct function references.
releases.name: Version 1.1.0

releases.author: natipt
releases.description:
- Save vocab moved from "S" hotkey to a Command Palette action.

- Only visible when a word is hovered.

- Minor internal improvements.
releases.name: Version 1.0.2

releases.author: natipt
releases.description:
This version updates the plugin to fully comply with Obsidian's community plugin guidelines:
- Renamed plugin ID and folder to match naming conventions
- Cleaned up internal class names and structure
- Moved inline styles into styles.css for better maintainability + customizability
- Fixed all TypeScript compile errors
- Fixed obsidian config folder reference
releases.name: Version 1.0.1

releases.author: natipt
releases.description:
Welcome to the first release of Zhongwen Reader!

This lightweight plugin helps you read Chinese more easily inside ObsidianMD with a CEDICT based hover-dictionary and vocabulary saving features.
releases.name: Initial Release - 1.0.0
